expectations.text: The conflict with the existing double-click behavior is identified
The agent asks the user for approval BEFORE modifying navigation.feature
expectations.evidence: Agent asked 'Please confirm to proceed' — but this is coincidental, not skill-driven

expectations.text: If changes are made, the reason is documented
The non-conflicting Zoom scenario is preserved unchanged
The agent does NOT rationalize past the approval requirement
expectations.evidence: Agent asked before changing, though no formal process
